actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Let's go back a few steps and start over.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Let's go back a few steps and start over, like a beautiful dance of surrender.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We can't start this project until everyone has mastered their part.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We can't start this project until everyone has mastered their part, just like a dance.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Progress is full of twist and turns like a dance in the ballroom.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Well, we took one step forward and two steps back.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Well, we took one step forward and two steps back in the flow of progress.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: I'll lead, if you follow; either way we will move forward.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Progress can be something that unites us all in a beautiful dance.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We've been dancing around this issue for too long.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We've been dancing around this issue for too long.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The country needs a new dance to advance.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The country needs a new dance to advance.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We are danc­ing toward the future.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We are danc­ing toward the future.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I'm off now, but we'll dance again later.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: I'm off now, but we'll dance again later.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We'll move at a fast pace.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We'll move at a fast pace but we will move forward.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: It takes two to tango when you work together in a partnership towards a shared goal.
